title: MO Energy Diagram Explorer
creator: Dan McCreary
subject: AP Chemistry
description: Interactive MO diagram builder for diatomic molecules with bond order and magnetism output.

learningObjectives: Construct MO energy diagrams for diatomic molecules
Evaluate bond order and magnetic character using MO configurations

keyQuestions: How does bond order change between O₂ and O₂⁻?
Why is B₂ paramagnetic while C₂ is not?
commonMisconceptions: All MO diagrams fill σ2p before π2p
Lewis bond order always equals MO bond order
assessmentOpportunities: Ask students to identify the number of unpaired electrons for a selected molecule
